jobs.title: Additional income as a part-time entrepreneur - Repair, installation, yard work, small renovations - Kouvola
jobs.meta_description: Sevalia Oy is seeking a part-time entrepreneur in Kouvola, Finland, offering repair, installation, yard work, and small renovations skills for an easy business
jobs.description: We are looking for a part-time entrepreneur with additional income potential - skilled in repair, installation, yard work, and small renovations - to join our team in Kouvola, Finland. This flexible position offers an easy business model without startup or fixed costs, providing electronic tools for appointment booking, online store management, automated payment processing, marketing support, and continuous instructions and support. Ideal candidates should be customer-focused, responsible, fluent in Finnish, and eager to complement current operations with a meaningful additional income source by helping seniors and families in their area.
what_we_expect: Customer service
Maintain relationships with customers
Communicate with customers
what_we_offer: A ready-made and easy business model without fixed costs
Electronic tools: appointment booking, online store, automated payment transaction
Marketing support and visibility in your area, you won't be alone
Clear instructions and continuous support for starting and running the operation
jobs.search_keywords: additional income, part-time entrepreneur, repair installation, yard work, small renovations, Kouvola

jobs.title: Excavator driver, shovel man
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: WE Rekry Oy seeks a skilled excavator driver and experienced shoveler for foundation construction sites in Kaarina, Turku. Strong civil engineering skills and
jobs.description: WE Rekry Oy is seeking a skilled excavator driver and experienced shoveler for various foundation construction sites in Kaarina, Turku. This role offers versatile job duties including the support of trenches, soil compaction, and scheduling and planning of work phases. Strong experience in civil engineering fields and the ability to read drawings are expected. The position is part of an expert work community with a fair and professional environment. A long-term employment relationship and salary according to TES corresponding to professional skills are offered. For more information or to inquire about the assignment, contact Samuli Hurme at 0503950495 or visit www.werekry.fi.
what_we_expect: Strong experience in the civil engineering field and ability to read drawings
Accurate, self-initiated and responsible approach to work
A valid occupational safety card
job_responsibilities: Earthmoving machine driver, open pit mine
what_we_offer: The possibility of a long-term employment relationship
Salary according to TES corresponding to professional skills
A fair and professional work environment
jobs.search_keywords: excavator driver shovel man foundation construction civil engineering drawings responsible approach occupational safety card

jobs.title: Sales Manager
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Join Länsi-Suomen Prosessivesi Oy in Säkylä as a Sales Manager to unify operating models for environmental sector players and develop effective sales strategies
jobs.description: We are looking for a sales manager to strengthen the sales work of three major players in the environmental sector by unifying operating models and fitting the services into one entity. As a sales manager, you will be responsible for developing and implementing your companies' sales plans while working closely with customers, your own organization, and management. Key tasks include making and developing targeted sales, building long-term and confidential customer relationships, and providing responsible solutions that support the circular economy.
what_we_expect: Experience in sales and customer development
The ability to visualize wholes and put things into practice
Active, independent and goal-oriented approach to work
Good interaction and negotiation skills
Interest in circular economy business and sustainable development
job_responsibilities: Making and developing sales in a targeted manner
Building long-term and confidential customer relationships
Implementing responsible solutions that support the circular economy
what_we_offer: A responsible and meaningful role in a developing organization
The opportunity to influence the growth of the business and the development of operating methods
jobs.search_keywords: sales manager, customer support, environmental sector, sales, customer development, circular economy, sustainable development

jobs.title: Production Coordinator
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Konecranes in Hyvinkää seeks a Production Coordinator to lead delivery projects globally, ensuring high performance and quality products. Remote work options
jobs.description: Konecranes in Hyvinkää is seeking a Production Coordinator to lead delivery projects globally, ensuring high performance and quality products. This role requires coordination of material flow from engineering to the site, with support from an experienced team. The position offers remote work options and flexible working hours, while providing continuous improvement opportunities through targeted training and development. With a strong technical background and excellent communication skills, this is an exciting opportunity for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments and can manage multiple projects simultaneously.
what_we_expect: Strong technical knowledge obtained from work experience, hobbies, or studies
Master of Science or Bachelor of Engineering from a suitable area
Solid technical understanding e.g. The ability to read and understand technical drawings
Target-oriented and analytical with good communication skills
Sense of urgency and an attitude to fix deviations quickly
Fluent in English; other languages are considered an asset
job_responsibilities: Coordinating the delivery projects with other stakeholders in the project team according to the project and process requirements
Creating Manufacturing Bill of Materials (MBOM) for delivery project
Planning and initiating deliveries in 1KC and other dedicated systems
Controlling the production of the delivery project in close co-operation and active communication with internal and external suppliers
Reacting and resolving unexpected situations in the supply chain
Improving continuously the Port Crane delivery process and production coordination
what_we_offer: Great opportunity to develop your skills in an interesting international work environment
Support of a professional and experienced team
Great viewpoint to all project phases and functions, including procurement, engineering, site operations, project management, and manufacturing
jobs.search_keywords: Production Coordinator Academic Work Finland Oy Helsinki industry-manufacturing-and-production

If you're eager to work hard and contribute positively to our team, we encourage you to apply by email at rekry@tstalotecs.fi.
